_what: Layer E — fresh-context multi-vote conflict-TIER review. 3 independent verifier subagents, distinct adversarial lenses (V1 under-surfacing / V2 over-escalation / V3 missing-executable-surfacing), each judging all 11 conflict items against the verbatim ledger + crawl.py tier logic. Majority vote per item; dissents adjudicated in verification_report.md and the ledger.
_method: Agent tool, subagent_type general-purpose, fresh context, read-only; output a verdict per ledger.

RUL-ROUTER-PRECEDENCE.disposition: confirmed; V1 notes the single-route caveat is over-surfacing noise (not dangerous)

RUL-X15-HIGHVALUE-READING.disposition: tier kept CAVEAT (surfaced via caveat, not silent); V1's concern about the validated->eligible accept added to the ledger open sub-questions

RUL-LIZETH-RIOS-AUTH.disposition: confirmed (router selects one process -> a single crawl never consults both matrices)

RUL-MAN-VERSION.votes: 2 agree DOC-LEVEL / 1 (V1) keeps tier but flags note understates data-currency risk
RUL-MAN-VERSION.disposition: tier kept DOC-LEVEL; ledger enriched with the 4.0-changelog data-currency warning

RUL-FLOTA-THRESHOLDS.disposition: tier kept REFERENCE-ONLY (the consumer_fleet_4plus enum fixes the segment, so >=4 is unambiguous at that branch); dissent recorded

RUL-ALCOHOLEMIA.disposition: cross-doc tier kept REFERENCE-ONLY; V3 surfaced a COVERAGE gap (R-097 licitaciones no-suscribir list is unwired executable logic) -> new open item O14

RUL-CLAUSE-BUNDLE.disposition: confirmed; V3 notes the Valor-Admitido prohibition inside RUL-2038-2112 is the same R-097 licitaciones logic flagged in O14

adjudicated_findings.action: added open sub-question: is the validated-importer branch faithfully `eligible` (stay in Standard), or should it refer/escalate given the bullet sits under the 'excluidos' header? The eligible outcome already rides with the X15 caveat (surfaced, not silent).

added data-currency warning: the 4.0 changelog lists changes to authorities (3.1.3/3.3), suscription limits (the 3.48M capacity) and franquicia Empresas — values the crawler ships off 3.0-stamped pages; the body numbers may be pre-4.0.

R-097 (licitaciones 'no pueden ser suscritas' list incl. alcoholemia >0,70 g/l and Valor Admitido) is captured as reference but not wired; a licitación quote requesting a barred condition is not blocked at runtime. Recorded as open item O14 (same class as O3 deferred eligibility wiring).

V3 suggested a router-branch provenance caveat; majority (V1+V2) declined — the consumer_fleet_4plus enum already fixes the Consumer segment, so the >=4 reading is unambiguous at that branch and a caveat would be noise. Dissent recorded, no change.

net: 9/11 tiers unanimously or strongly confirmed correct; 0 silent-resolution holes found. 4 med/low dissents -> represented (ledger enrichment) or recorded as a coverage open item (O14). NO tier was flipped on a minority vote (flipping is a modeling/underwriter decision, per represent-don't-resolve).
